case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. VS DOW LINDA J. et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J. DOW MARY D. $2,310.01 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,376.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,310.01 FILED BY HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J. DOW MARY D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $400.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $75.29 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,126.71 AS TO DEFENDANT DOW LINDA J.
